cases.title: System automatically assigns Waitlisted when event is full and waitlist is enabled
preconditions: Event is RegistrationOpen with waitlistEnabled true
Registered participant count equals EventCapacity (event is full)
Registration window is active per BR-02
New participant has no active registration for the event
steps: Invoke registrationService.register(eventId, participantId, actorContext) for a participant with no prior registration
Read the returned registration entity snapshot and waitlist entry if present
cases.expected: System assigns state Waitlisted automatically without organizer intervention; waitlistPosition is a positive integer (1 for first entrant); Registered count remains at EventCapacity without overflow; testing-plan §3 row Register when full + waitlist enabled → Waitlisted satisfied

cases.title: POST registrations returns HTTP 200 with Waitlisted envelope when full
preconditions: Published event with registration opened, capacity 1, waitlistEnabled true
One participant already Registered consuming the sole seat
Second participant has valid JWT and no active registration
Fresh Idempotency-Key header value
steps: POST /api/v1/events/{eventId}/registrations as the second participant with Authorization bearer token and Idempotency-Key header
GET /api/v1/events/{eventId}/registration-status for the same participant
cases.expected: POST returns HTTP 200 with body containing state Waitlisted, waitlistPosition 1, registrationId, eventId, participantId, reasonCode null, and updatedAt; GET registration-status returns the same Waitlisted assignment; system auto-statusing per FR-08

cases.title: queueWaitlist state transition guard permits Waitlisted when full and waitlist enabled
preconditions: Registration in Requested state
registeredCount equals EventCapacity
waitlistEnabled is true
Registration window open and no duplicate active registration
steps: Call queueWaitlist transition guard with preconditions above
Verify guard returns permitted transition to Waitlisted
cases.expected: Guard permits Requested to Waitlisted transition when full and waitlist enabled per state machine transition table; guard requires full + waitlist enabled

cases.title: Capacity guard routes to waitlist when registeredCount equals capacity and waitlistEnabled
preconditions: Pure capacity decision inputs: registeredCount, capacity, waitlistEnabled
steps: Evaluate capacity decision for registeredCount=5, capacity=5, waitlistEnabled=true
Evaluate for registeredCount=1, capacity=1, waitlistEnabled=true
Evaluate for registeredCount=10, capacity=10, waitlistEnabled=true
cases.expected: Each evaluation returns waitlist assign outcome (not Registered and not reject); aligns with testing plan unit target capacity guard validator and BR-04

cases.title: queueWaitlist transition persists Waitlisted state and waitlist entry in real DB transaction
preconditions: Event RegistrationOpen, full capacity, waitlistEnabled true
New registration request passes auth, window, and dedupe checks
Postgres available for integration test harness
steps: Execute queueWaitlist via registration module pipeline against real database
Query registration row state and waitlist_entries record
cases.expected: Registration row persisted with state Waitlisted; waitlist_entries row exists with matching position; transition from Requested to Waitlisted recorded; system outcome matches Flow B waitlist entry step

cases.title: Participant UI reflects system-assigned Waitlisted status after registration on full event
preconditions: Event detail page shows open registration with full capacity and waitlist enabled
Participant logged in with no existing registration for the event
At least one other participant already Registered
steps: Navigate to event detail and initiate registration via UI
Observe registration status panel or badge after action completes
Open my registrations list and locate the same event
cases.expected: UI displays Waitlisted status with queue position or equivalent queue messaging; no manual organizer approval step required; status consistent with API registration-status

cases.title: Multiple waitlist entrants receive FIFO positions by enqueue order
preconditions: Event capacity 1, waitlistEnabled true, one Registered participant
Three distinct participants with no active registration
Fixed clock or sequential registration calls to establish deterministic enqueue order
steps: Register participant A, then B, then C while event remains full
Read waitlistPosition for each Waitlisted registration from database
cases.expected: System assigns Waitlisted to all three with waitlistPosition 1, 2, 3 respectively; ordering matches FIFO by timestamp per BR-04; FR-08 applies to each entrant

cases.title: Waitlisted assignment does not increment Registered count beyond capacity
preconditions: Event capacity N with exactly N participants in Registered state
waitlistEnabled true
New participant with no active registration
steps: Register additional participant via registrationService.register
Query count of Registered participants for the event
cases.expected: System assigns Waitlisted to new participant; total Registered count remains N (equals EventCapacity); BR-03 invariant holds; no seat consumed by waitlist entrant

cases.title: Concurrent registrations when full assign Waitlisted without capacity overflow
preconditions: Event capacity 5 with five Registered participants (full)
waitlistEnabled true
Eight distinct participants attempt registration concurrently
Each participant has no prior active registration
steps: Fire concurrent registrationService.register calls from eight participants while event is full
Aggregate results and query Registered count
cases.expected: All eight concurrent entrants receive Waitlisted with unique sequential waitlistPosition values; Registered count remains exactly 5; no additional Registered assignments; core scenario matrix capacity under heavy concurrent requests satisfied for waitlist path

cases.title: Full event with waitlist disabled does not assign Waitlisted
preconditions: Event capacity 1, waitlistEnabled false, one Registered participant
Second participant authenticated with no active registration
Fresh Idempotency-Key header value
steps: POST /api/v1/events/{eventId}/registrations as the second participant
cases.expected: HTTP 422 or 409 with error code REGISTRATION_REJECTED_FULL; response state is not Waitlisted; no waitlist entry created; FR-08 precondition (waitlist enabled) not met

cases.title: Registration at exact capacity boundary assigns Waitlisted to next participant
preconditions: Event capacity 2, waitlistEnabled true, zero Registered participants
Three authenticated participants (P1, P2, P3) with no active registrations
steps: POST registrations for P1 and P2 until capacity is filled
POST registration for P3
Verify P1, P2, and P3 responses
cases.expected: P1 and P2 receive state Registered; P3 receives state Waitlisted with waitlistPosition 1 from system auto-assignment; FR-08 triggers only after capacity is reached

cases.title: Registration outside window does not assign Waitlisted even when event is full
preconditions: Event is full with waitlistEnabled true
Current time is before registrationOpenAt or after registrationCloseAt via fixed clock
Participant has no active registration
steps: POST /api/v1/events/{eventId}/registrations as the participant
cases.expected: HTTP 422 with error code REGISTRATION_WINDOW_CLOSED; no Waitlisted state assigned; FR-08 precondition (valid registration request within window) not met

cases.title: Duplicate active registration attempt does not create second Waitlisted entry
preconditions: Event full with waitlistEnabled true
Participant already has active Waitlisted registration for the event
steps: POST /api/v1/events/{eventId}/registrations again for the same participant and event
cases.expected: HTTP 409 with error code REGISTRATION_DUPLICATE_ACTIVE; existing Waitlisted registration unchanged; no duplicate waitlist position created

cases.title: Waitlist enqueue persists atomically with registration in one transaction
preconditions: Event full with waitlistEnabled true
Database transaction boundaries enabled for registration module
New participant with no active registration
steps: Complete a successful registration that system assigns Waitlisted state
Query registration row and waitlist_entries row in the same database session
cases.expected: Registration row exists with state Waitlisted and corresponding waitlist_entries record with matching position; both committed atomically per cross-module transaction boundary for registration assignment + waitlist handling

cases.title: Waitlisted assignment requires no organizer manual approval or intervention
preconditions: Event RegistrationOpen, full capacity, waitlistEnabled true
Only Participant actor initiates registration; no Organizer Admin or Staff action
steps: Participant invokes registrationService.register without any prior organizer waitlist placement
Verify registration state and audit that no manual override was required
cases.expected: System actor automatically assigns Waitlisted per FR-08 functional requirement format (Actor: System); participant registration succeeds without organizer workflow step

cases.title: Idempotent waitlist registration retry returns consistent Waitlisted snapshot
preconditions: Event full with waitlistEnabled true
Participant authenticated with no prior registration
Fixed Idempotency-Key value prepared for the register endpoint
steps: POST /api/v1/events/{eventId}/registrations with Idempotency-Key K and receive Waitlisted response
Repeat POST with the same Idempotency-Key K and identical payload
cases.expected: Both responses return HTTP 200 with the same registrationId, state Waitlisted, and waitlistPosition; only one waitlist entry is created; Registered count unchanged

cases.title: Waitlisted assignment executes within capacity guard transaction without seat consumption
preconditions: Event at capacity with waitlistEnabled true
Registration module uses BEGIN/COMMIT with row lock on event rule config
steps: Complete successful registration that system assigns Waitlisted
Verify transaction wraps insert, in-transaction registered count check, waitlist enqueue, and commit
cases.expected: Waitlisted assignment and capacity check commit atomically; Registered count unchanged after commit; no intermediate state where Registered count exceeds capacity

cases.title: Flow B waitlist entry step yields system-assigned Waitlisted status
preconditions: E2E fixture: published event with capacity 1 and waitlistEnabled true
First participant Registered consuming the sole seat
Second participant token and fresh idempotency key
steps: Execute Flow B step: POST /api/v1/events/{eventId}/registrations for second participant after event is full
Verify registration state before proceeding to cancellation and auto-promotion steps
cases.expected: Registration response state is Waitlisted with waitlistPosition 1 assigned automatically by system; enables subsequent Flow B cancellation and FR-12 promotion steps; core scenario matrix Register when full + waitlist enabled maps to Waitlisted

cases.title: Organizer waitlist list paginates system-assigned Waitlisted participants with correct position
preconditions: Event full with waitlistEnabled true and at least one system-assigned Waitlisted participant
Organizer Admin JWT with scope for the event
steps: GET /api/v1/events/{eventId}/waitlist?page=1&pageSize=20 with organizer Authorization
Locate the waitlisted participant in items and verify page metadata
cases.expected: HTTP 200 with paginated envelope containing items, page, pageSize, total, and totalPages; waitlisted participant sorted by position ascending (default sort position:asc); item reflects Waitlisted registration consistent with participant-facing registration-status

cases.title: State transition guard rejects queueWaitlist when seats remain available
preconditions: registeredCount strictly less than capacity
waitlistEnabled true
Registration otherwise valid (window open, no duplicate)
steps: Call queueWaitlist transition guard when registeredCount < capacity
Verify guard denies Waitlisted transition
cases.expected: Guard rejects Requested to Waitlisted transition; routes to Registered path instead; confirms FR-08 full-capacity precondition is enforced at state machine layer

cases.title: OrganizerAdmin and OrganizerStaff denied POST registrations on full waitlist-enabled event
preconditions: Event RegistrationOpen, full capacity, waitlistEnabled true
Valid JWT for OrganizerAdmin (or OrganizerStaff scoped to the event)
Actor has no participant registration for the event
steps: POST /api/v1/events/{eventId}/registrations with OrganizerAdmin bearer token and Idempotency-Key
Repeat POST with OrganizerStaff bearer token for the same event
cases.expected: Both requests return HTTP 403 unauthorized; no registration row is created; Register for event capability is Participant-only per roles-permissions matrix
